_comment: Ranker-regression expectations over data/seed.json + data/cooccurrence.json. CHARACTERIZATION values (what the deterministic engine produces for the default JOURNEY archetype at the trust>=0.50 gate), not hand-picked winners. Update deliberately when the seed, co-occurrence, or scoring changes, and record why. History: science subgraph -> Mithra; Hellenistic-India-Buddhism bridge (0011); default cap cut 6->4 (0012); breadth clusters Greece (0016), Egypt (0017), Islamic Golden Age (0018), Scientific Revolution (0019), East Asia (0020); journey cap cut 4->3 (0021, fixed-length 3-hop journeys); Norse/Celtic (0022); Chinese tech (0023); second-order co-occurrence (0025), reworked by full-link Jaccard similarity (0029) which measures shared context over each article's whole outbound link set rather than the seed-sized keyhole -- this de-saturated the term (max tie-fraction 94% -> 1.1%) and re-ordered the endpoints again. At the 3-hop cap the winners are Roman Empire -> India (via Silk Road -> Buddhism), Christianity -> Paper (via Roman Empire -> Silk Road), and Euclid -> India (via Alexandria -> Alexander the Great). Re-characterise after any seed/co-occurrence/scoring change.
